comment: Best salon in the area! Raju sir is an absolute expert. My haircut was perfect and the head massage was so relaxing. Will definitely come back.
Good service and clean ambiance. The facial was really refreshing. Slightly long waiting time but worth it.
Excellent beard trim and styling. The staff is very professional and friendly. Great value for money.
Average experience. The haircut was decent but the waiting area could be improved. Will try again.
Amazing haircut! Got the exact style I wanted. The staff listens carefully and delivers perfectly. Highly recommend!
Anitha madam is a genius with hair color! My balayage looks so natural and beautiful. The salon ambiance is very premium.
The gold facial was absolutely luxurious. My skin is glowing! Very hygienic and professional setup.
Great experience overall. The manicure and pedicure were done very neatly. Prices are a bit high but service quality justifies it.
Party makeup by Kavitha madam was stunning! Got so many compliments. Will definitely book again for my sister's engagement.
Haircut turned out really well. The stylist understood my hair texture and gave a perfect cut. Good experience.
Venkatesh sir is the best barber I have visited. His shaving technique is traditional and flawless. The hot towel treatment is divine!
The royal shave experience here is unmatched. Feels like a premium barbershop experience at a very reasonable price.
Very good barber shop. Clean, professional, and affordable. The beard design took my look to the next level.
Best place for men's grooming here. Regular customer for 3 years. Never disappointed.
My bridal makeup was absolutely breathtaking. Sowmya madam has an incredible eye for detail. Got compliments from all guests!
The ombre coloring is gorgeous! Lakshmi stylish really understood my vision. Will come back for keratin next month.
Full body massage was very relaxing. Clean environment and professional staff. The gel nail extension looks amazing.
Best women's salon here by far. Every service is top quality. The D-tan facial really cleared my skin.
Good unisex salon. Comfortable for the whole family. Kids haircut was done patiently and the little one didn't cry at all!
Nice clean-up facial. Good results. The color service was also done well. Reasonable prices.
Average experience. Haircut was okay but the waiting time was too long. Staff was polite though.
The diamond facial here is life-changing! Saritha madam really knows her craft. My skin has never looked better. Premium experience at good prices.
Engagement makeup by Pooja was absolutely perfect. She matched my outfit colors so well. Got so many compliments!
Aromatherapy massage was the most relaxing experience of my life. The essential oils and technique are perfect. Booking again next week!
Nail art came out beautifully. The nail artist is very skilled. The designs are unique and long-lasting.
Kiran's fade haircut is absolutely on point. Looks straight out of a magazine. Best men's salon in Station Road area!
Perfect beard service! The full beard package left my beard looking and feeling amazing. Great ambiance too.
Really good haircut. The stylist suggested a new style that suited my face shape perfectly. Happy customer!
Keratin treatment transformed my frizzy hair completely! Sunitha madam is an expert. Worth every rupee!
Reception makeup was beautiful. Geeta madam has great taste and skill. The look lasted all night without touch-ups.
Creative cut looks amazing! The stylist really understood what I wanted even from my vague description. Highly recommend!
Good traditional barbershop. Clean and hygienic. Ravi sir does an excellent hot towel shave. Good value for money.
Comfortable neighborhood barbershop. The head massage is very good. Kids haircut was done well and quickly.
The classic Indian head massage here is authentic and wonderful. I come every week just for the head massage. Amazing!
Smitha's balayage work is the best I've seen. She blended the colors so naturally. Getting compliments everywhere!
Oxygen facial gave my skin an instant glow. The spa pedicure was heavenly. This salon is my happy place!
Swedish massage was deeply relaxing. The therapist focused on my problem areas. Will definitely come back.
Good haircut and beard grooming service. Vinay is skilled and gives good suggestions. Clean salon.
Hair smoothening came out great! Very happy with the result. The brightening facial also worked well.
Budget-friendly salon with decent service. Haircut is clean and neat. Head massage is the best part. Will come regularly.
Okay experience. Basic haircut and shave done well. Nothing fancy but good for the price.
My bridal package at Glamour Studio was absolutely perfect. Meena madam's saree draping is an art form. I was the most beautiful bride!
The acrylic nails are so beautiful and long-lasting. Jyothi madam's nail art is very creative and professional.
Good men's salon. Sunil gives a clean haircut every time. The facial was also effective. Nice experience overall.
Thai massage at Tranquil Spa is a must-try! Chandrika is very skilled in traditional techniques. Totally transformed my back pain.
Hydrafacial was incredible. My skin looks 5 years younger. Padma is so knowledgeable about skin care. Worth every rupee!
Bharat's undercut is very stylish. The barber knows current trends well. Good men's grooming spot.
Rebonding by Vijaya madam is absolutely perfect. Hair is silky and straight even after multiple washes. Highly recommend!
This is the most premium salon experience I've had. Madhuri's creative color work is absolutely stunning. Worth the price!
Good neighborhood salon. Clean and comfortable. Foot massage is very relaxing after a long day. Will come back.
